chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1802 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 15845/16 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 15846/16 4. For Katcha Peshi. 04.11.2016. Mr. Muhammad Ahmed Khan Pathan, Advocate for petitioner. -.-.-. 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. It is, inter alia, contended that primarily the dispute is between petitioner and respondents No.4 & 5 with regard to some financial transaction which later came to an end. Issue notices to respondents as well as A.A.G for a date to be fixed after three weeks. Notices to private respondents be issued through all modes except publication. Concerned SHO (respondent No.3) will be present in Court in person alongwith respondents No.4 & 5 and respondent No.2 d(SSP Sanghar) is hereby directed to ensure presence of above named respondents in Court. In the meantime, respondents are restrained from causing harassment to the petitioner and official respondents should conduct themselves in accordance with law. Copy of this order be provided to learned A.A.G for strict compliance. JUDGE Ali Haider
